title: AI created Automations cannot be deleted
excerpt:
Hi, 
During the creation of my Monday.com workspace i have added 100+ automations. I try to keep the automations-tab as clean as possible and delete unused or outdated automations. I was curious about the AI automations …

posts.author: JorisMors (Joris Morshuis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

During the creation of my Monday.com workspace i have added 100+ automations. I try to keep the automations-tab as clean as possible and delete unused or outdated automations. I was curious about the AI automations and wanted to see what they can do for me. I tested out some of the functionalities and the AI function automatically created a couple of automations within my board. Since this was only a test i want to delete the automations, but to my surprise it’s not possible to delete these; even after i have already deleted the AI collumn.

Is anyone else experiencing difficulties with this? Is it a Bug or am i doing something wrong?

Thanks!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: You’ll need to deactivate the AI at the column level. For each column that has AI, you’ll need to edit the column. Then once your ‘turn off’ the AI there, you’ll be able to delete the automation.

posts.author: ivan_b (Ivan)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m experiencing the same issue, even with admin rights not able to delete / deactivate the “ai app“ automation on the board. This is frustrating.
